title: Quarterly re-ingest automation + drift detection
context: Data freshness (O7) requires quarterly re-ingest and drift detection so the catalog stays current and dead links stay below 5% (PLAN M3, section 15). Depends on the CI gates (010). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Automate quarterly re-ingest with drift detection that surfaces changed/removed upstream records and dead links for review.
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduled quarterly re-ingest runs idempotently and refreshes retrieval dates + checksums.
Drift detection reports added/changed/removed upstream records and new dead links (target <5%, O7) without silently overwriting curated values.
Re-ingest respects sources.yaml ingest flags and re-id gate; reviewed by maintainer.
output: A merged PR adding scheduled quarterly re-ingest automation + drift-detection reporting.
